title: AI-Writing Scandals Are Getting Very Confusing
description: What counts as an acceptable use of AI has never been fuzzier.
author: Will Oremus

title: Hegseth’s Leadership of the U.S. Military
description: Panelists joined to discuss how the defense secretary may be reshaping the Pentagon, and more.
author: The Editors

title: Putin Can No Longer Hide His Catastrophe
description: The Russian dictator has lost control of the narrative.
author: Phillips Payson O’Brien

title: The Meanest Tradition in Entertainment
description: Celebrity roasts have become crueler in their style of comedy, and almost unwatchable.
author: Vikram Murthi

title: Don’t Put Too Much Pressure on Your Summer Vacation
description: There is no single right way to enjoy a family trip—but there can be a lot of expectations.
author: Rafaela Jinich

title: The Bad Beer That’s an Incredible Beverage
author: Tyler Austin Harper

title: The Absurd Misunderstanding Fueling the Debate OverThe Odyssey
description: Elon Musk’s outrage at Christopher Nolan says more about today’s myopic notion of identity than it does about classical antiquity.
author: Thomas Chatterton Williams

title: There’s Never Been a Better Time to Study Computer Science
description: Even as AI progresses, coders aren’t doomed.
author: Lila Shroff

title: Barney Frank Was Like No One Else
description: He was the smartest man in the room, a rare attribute for a member of modern-day Congress.
author: Robert G. Kaiser

title: College Should Be Way More Fun
description: I’m not talking about keg stands. I’m talking about the joyous mysteries of intellectual life.
author: Michael A. Elliott

title: Why College Students Are Booing AI
author: Ian Bogost

title: Why Would Europeans Believe Trump Now?
description: The administration keeps changing its mind on troop deployments.
author: Nancy A. Youssef,Isaac Stanley-Becker,  andSimon Shuster

title: Out of the Gerrymandering Darkness, a New Hope for Reform
description: Some think it could lead to a change in the political system.

title: What Is Hunter Biden Doing?
description: The former president’s son tearfully met with Candace Owens, who once called him a “degenerate.”

title: Tulsi Gabbard Takes the Exit Ramp
description: Excluded from Trump’s inner circle, she sought the president’s approval by spreading baseless claims.

title: The Ahmadinejad Option
description: The idea that Israel and the United States might back Mahmoud Ahmadinejad in a coup has drawn guffaws from several different groups.

title: How Trump’s Culture War Derailed a New Smithsonian Museum
description: Republicans wanted to narrow the scope of the Women’s History Museum and give the president power over its location. The attempt failed.

title: The Sheep DetectivesIs More Than Just Fluff
description: Its cast of talking animals solve mysteries and move audiences to tears.

title: The Surprising Lesson of theGrantaControversy
description: Literary organizations might need to get more familiar with AI if they want to protect against its encroachment.

title: How Dropout Cracked Internet Comedy
description: Sam Reich on building “better internet” and not “worse Netflix”
